accounts.title: OANDA Accounts
accounts.placeholder: Account management will be implemented in a future task
accounts.defaultAccountDescription: The default account is used to collect market data and latest tick data. Only one account can be set as default at a time.
accounts.defaultAccountInfo: The default account is used to fetch market data and collect tick data for analysis. The candle chart will use the default account to display price data. You can switch the default account at any time.
accounts.leaveBlankToKeepToken: Leave blank to keep existing token
accounts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this account?

preferences.title: User Preferences
preferences.placeholder: Preferences (timezone, language, notifications) will be implemented in a future task
preferences.timezoneInfo: Changing your timezone will affect how timestamps are displayed throughout the application.

strategyDefaults.title: Strategy Defaults
strategyDefaults.placeholder: Default strategy parameters will be implemented in a future task
strategyDefaults.info: These default values will be used when creating new trading strategies. You can override them for individual strategies.

security.title: Security Settings
security.placeholder: Security settings (password change, 2FA) will be implemented in a future task

display.info: Display settings are saved locally and applied immediately. Default currency pair and timeframe are used when the dashboard chart preferences are reset.

data.sessionTimeoutInfo: The session will automatically expire after the specified period of inactivity. Set to 'Never' to stay logged in until you manually log out.
data.healthCheckInfo: Controls how often the application checks the OANDA API connection status shown in the footer. Lower values provide faster detection but increase network traffic.
